issues.title: fix stellar e2e config
Add Cerebrus Pulse — crypto derivatives intelligence (Data Services)
feat(search): surface invokeUrl with proxy fallback
Per-token pricing ($X/1M tokens) is broken — metering layer missing
Feat: prepare project for containerized deployment
feat: BDD tests + upstream auth + OASF-enriched ERC-8004 registration
Improve metadata validation in message handlers and add test for inva…
Claude/add-stellar-support-gjXK7
chore(stellar): Add channels with x402 example
feat: real estate listing intelligence API (issue #79)
proxy kizuna routes via x402 gateway

feat: add paid token analysis MCP server with x402 USDC payments

Add a paid analysis service that exposes the existing Gemini-powered
TokenAnalyzer pipeline as an MCP tool behind an x402 USDC paywall
on Solana.

New components:
- app/api_server.py: FastAPI endpoint wrapping TokenAnalyzer
- app/cli.py: --http-api flag to run the FastAPI server
- server/: TypeScript MCP server (payment gateway)
  - src/index.ts: McpServer with analyze_token tool + x402 enforcement
  - src/payments.ts: Payment requirements from env vars
  - Dockerfile: Node 22 Alpine production image
- docker-compose.yml: api-service + analysis-server containers
- .env.example: SERVER_WALLET_ADDRESS, SERVER_PRICE_ANALYZE, etc.

The Python API is internal-only (Docker network); the TypeScript
server is the public entry point on port 4022. Existing bot
functionality is completely untouched.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
enforce kizuna prefund lane and add funding ops
feat: add SnapAPI to ecosystem (x402-enabled screenshot/document API)
feat: Status Network (SN) as alternative execution layer alongside LEZ
feat: BDD integration tests + upstream auth injection + tunnel URL
feat: Airbnb & short-term rental intelligence API
Add @pi2labs/x402-server — server-side x402 payment middleware for FastSet
Replace chainbase.sh with chainbase CLI
createQuicknodeX402Client() baseUrl should default to "https://x402.quicknode.com"
